issues.description: Second effect object is completely fabricated. Card text only describes one effect: '[On K.O.] Play up to 1 {Revolutionary Army} type Character card with a cost of 4 or less from your hand.' There is no trigger condition about 'Leader with Revolutionary Army type' or 'PlaySelf' action in the official text.
Filter uses 'subType' but should use 'type' for character type classification (Revolutionary Army is a type, not subtype).
